name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no guilt, no pressure. We just wanted you to know the door is open whenever you'd like to come back.

If it helps, here's a personal 20% off code for your next visit with us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days and works on cleanings or any other visit you book.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, we'd genuinely love to hear about it — just hit reply. A real person (me) reads every note.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle reminder your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days if you'd like to come back in. No pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
